# google_compute_firewall_policy_iam_policy

Retrieves the current IAM policy data for firewallpolicy


## Example Usage


```hcl
data "google_compute_firewall_policy_iam_policy" "policy" {
  name = google_compute_firewall_policy.default.name
}
```

## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

* `name` - (Required) Used to find the parent resource to bind the IAM policy to

## Attributes Reference

The attributes are exported:

* `etag` - (Computed) The etag of the IAM policy.

* `policy_data` - (Required only by `google_compute_firewall_policy_iam_policy`) The policy data generated by
  a `google_iam_policy` data source.
